alignments.json_text: what would life be like should the Lord come today
alignments.wiki_text: Dear George, I was sitting in my office the other day, and I was thinkin' about the days that gone by, rememberin' the good times you and I had had, and tryin' to avoid the bad. Over and over again I kept wonderin', what would life be like should the Lord come today and take my good friend George Jones off into the night? I kept tellin' myself, why, it couldn't be, but knowin' all along that it is surely sooner than I would believe. So I wrote a last message to my good buddy George, and it's one that I think you oughta listen to. One that you sure need to hear. It goes something like this...

alignments.json_text: The most important thing to remember about a normal bowel
